calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-27-2016 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-27-2016 Continued To Aug-10-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-02-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lisa Serebin of Creitz & Serebin LLP telephone number 415-466-3090 for Plaintiff Sarah Stevens.
Craig Rutenberg of Manatt, Phelps & Phillips, LLP telephone number 310-312-4333 for Defendant Blue Shield of California Life & Health Insurance.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court confirmed its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT BLUE SHIELD OF CALIFORNIA LIFE & HEALTH INSURANCE COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO to all four claims alleged in the first amended complaint is sustained without leave to amend. Assuming that Ms. Stevens has named the correct Blue Shield entity as the defendant or that she can amend her complaint to do so, nonetheless all of Ms. Stevens' claims fail as a matter of law because they are premised on the allegation that the Blue Shield entity that issued her HMO plan owed her an obligation to pay her medical providers. However, there is no such obligation in Ms. Stevens' HMO plan and thus Ms. Stevens' allegations that Blue Shield is liable to her for its refusal to pay Dr. Chang and the consequent harm she suffered do not state cognizable claims. Although Ms. Stevens requests leave to amend in the event that any of her claims are deemed deficient, she does not provide any indication of how she would amend that would enable her to allege any cognizable claim. The prevailing party is to prepare a form of order that tracks the tentative ruling verbatim and comply with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-21-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT BLUE SHIELD OF CALIFORNIA LIFE & HEALTH INSURANCE COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend. No opposition filed. The prevailing party is to provide a form of order.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/EG)
